CVE-2001-1013.name: Apache "mod_userdir" User Enumeration
CVE-2001-1013.description:
Apache with the UserDir directive enabled generates different error
      codes when a username exists and there is no public_html directory and when the username
      does not exist, which could allow remote attackers to determine valid usernames on the
      server.
RedHat Linux 7.0 Apache - Remote Username Enumeration
CVE-2001-1013.author: Gabriel A Maggiotti

CVE-2001-0537.name: Cisco IOS HTTP Unauthorized Administrative Access
CVE-2001-0537.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the Cisco IOS HTTP Server.
          By sending a GET request for "/level/num/exec/..", where num is between
          16 and 99, it is possible to bypass authentication and obtain full system
          control. IOS 11.3 -> 12.2 are reportedly vulnerable. This module
          tested successfully against a Cisco 1600 Router IOS v11.3(11d).
Cisco IOS 11.x/12.x - HTTP Configuration Arbitrary Administrative Access (1)
CVE-2001-0537.author: cronos

CVE-2001-0537.description: Cisco IOS 11.x/12.x - HTTP Configuration Arbitrary Administrative Access (2)
CVE-2001-0537.author: Eliel C. Sardanons

CVE-2001-0537.description: Cisco IOS 11.x/12.x - HTTP Configuration Arbitrary Administrative Access (3)
CVE-2001-0537.author: hypoclear

CVE-2001-0537.description: Cisco IOS 11.x/12.x - HTTP Configuration Arbitrary Administrative Access (4)
CVE-2001-0537.author: blackangels

info.Name: Cisco IOS HTTP Configuration - Authentication Bypass
info.Description: HTTP server for Cisco IOS 11.3 to 12.2 allows attackers to bypass authentication and execute arbitrary commands, when local authorization is being used, by specifying a high access level in the URL.

CVE-2001-0800.name: Irix LPD tagprinter Command Execution
CVE-2001-0800.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary command execution flaw in
          the in.lpd service shipped with all versions of Irix.

CVE-2001-0311.name: HP OpenView OmniBack II Command Execution
CVE-2001-0311.description:
This module uses a vulnerability in the OpenView Omniback II
          service to execute arbitrary commands. This vulnerability was
          discovered by DiGiT and his code was used as the basis for this
          module.

          For Microsoft Windows targets, due to module limitations, use the
          "unix/cmd/generic" payload and set CMD to your command. You can only
          pass a small amount of characters (4) to the command line on Windows.
HP OpenView OmniBack II - Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-0311.author: Metasploit

CVE-2001-0311.description: HP OpenView OmniBack II - Generic Remote Command Execution
CVE-2001-0311.author: DiGiT

CVE-2001-0311.description: HP OpenView OmniBack II A.03.50 - Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-0311.author: H D Moore

CVE-2001-0414.name: NTP Daemon readvar Buffer Overflow
CVE-2001-0414.description:
This module exploits a stack based buffer overflow in the
          ntpd and xntpd service. By sending an overly long 'readvar'
          request it is possible to execute code remotely. As the stack
          is corrupted, this module uses the Egghunter technique.
NTP daemon readvar - Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-0414.author: Metasploit

CVE-2001-0797.name: System V Derived /bin/login Extraneous Arguments Buffer Overflow
CVE-2001-0797.description:
This exploit connects to a system's modem over dialup and exploits
          a buffer overflow vulnerability in it's System V derived /bin/login.
          The vulnerability is triggered by providing a large number of arguments.

CVE-2001-0797.name: Solaris in.telnetd TTYPROMPT Buffer Overflow
CVE-2001-0797.description:
This module uses a buffer overflow in the Solaris 'login'
          application to bypass authentication in the telnet daemon.
System V Derived /bin/login - Extraneous Arguments Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-0797.author: Metasploit

CVE-2001-0797.description: System V Derived /bin/login - Extraneous Arguments Buffer Overflow (modem based) (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-0797.author: I)ruid

CVE-2001-0803.name: Solaris dtspcd Heap Overflow
CVE-2001-0803.description:
This is a port of noir's dtspcd exploit. This module should
          work against any vulnerable version of Solaris 8 (sparc).
          The original exploit code was published in the book
          Shellcoder's Handbook.

CVE-2001-1583.name: Solaris LPD Command Execution
CVE-2001-1583.description:
This module exploits an arbitrary command execution flaw in
          the in.lpd service shipped with all versions of Sun Solaris
          up to and including 8.0. This module uses a technique
          discovered by Dino Dai Zovi to exploit the flaw without
          needing to know the resolved name of the attacking system.

CVE-2001-0241.name: MS01-023 Microsoft IIS 5.0 Printer Host Header Overflow
CVE-2001-0241.description:
This exploits a buffer overflow in the request processor of the
          Internet Printing Protocol ISAPI module in IIS. This module
          works against Windows 2000 Server and Professional SP0-SP1.

          If the service stops responding after a successful compromise,
          run the exploit a couple more times to completely kill the
          hung process.
Microsoft IIS 5.0 - '.printer' ISAPI Extension Buffer Overflow (1)
CVE-2001-0241.author: storm

CVE-2001-0241.description: Microsoft IIS 5.0 - '.printer' ISAPI Extension Buffer Overflow (2)
CVE-2001-0241.author: dark spyrit

CVE-2001-0241.author: Cyrus The Great

CVE-2001-0241.author: Metasploit

CVE-2001-0241.author: Ryan Permeh

CVE-2001-0241.author: dark spyrit

CVE-2001-0500.name: MS01-033 Microsoft IIS 5.0 IDQ Path Overflow
CVE-2001-0500.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the IDQ ISAPI handler for
          Microsoft Index Server.
Microsoft Index Server 2.0 / Indexing Service (Windows 2000) - ISAPI Extension Buffer Overflow (PoC)
CVE-2001-0500.author: Ps0

CVE-2001-0500.description: Microsoft Index Server 2.0 / Indexing Service (Windows 2000) - ISAPI Extension Buffer Overflow (2)
CVE-2001-0500.author: hsj

CVE-2001-0500.author: mat

CVE-2001-0500.description: Microsoft Index Server 2.0 / Indexing Service (Windows 2000) - ISAPI Extension Buffer Overflow (4)
CVE-2001-0500.author: blackangels

CVE-2001-1320.name: Network Associates PGP KeyServer 7 LDAP Buffer Overflow
CVE-2001-1320.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the LDAP service that is
          part of the NAI PGP Enterprise product suite. This module was tested
          against PGP KeyServer v7.0. Due to space restrictions, egghunter is
          used to find our payload - therefore you may wish to adjust WfsDelay.
Network Associates PGP KeyServer 7 - LDAP Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-1320.author: Metasploit

CVE-2001-0499.name: Oracle 8i TNS Listener (ARGUMENTS) Buffer Overflow
CVE-2001-0499.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Oracle 8i. When
          sending a specially crafted packet containing an overly long
          ARGUMENTS string to the TNS service, an attacker may be able
          to execute arbitrary code.
Oracle 8i - TNS Listener 'ARGUMENTS' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2001-0499.author: Metasploit

CVE-2001-0167.name: RealVNC 3.3.7 Client Buffer Overflow
CVE-2001-0167.description: This module exploits a buffer overflow in RealVNC 3.3.7 (vncviewer.exe).

CVE-2001-0168.name: WinVNC Web Server GET Overflow
CVE-2001-0168.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the AT&T WinVNC version
          <= v3.3.3r7 web server. When debugging mode with logging is
          enabled (non-default), an overly long GET request can overwrite
          the stack. This exploit does not work well with VNC payloads!

CVE-2001-0152.name: Windows Gather DynaZIP Saved Password Extraction
CVE-2001-0152.description:
This module extracts clear text credentials from dynazip.log.
          The log file contains passwords used to encrypt compressed zip
          files in Microsoft Plus! 98 and Windows Me.
